title: Piptatherum microcarpum
taxonomy: Piptatherum microcarpum belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It is a member of the tribe Hordeeae, which includes various grass species. Within the tribe Hordeeae, Piptatherum microcarpum is classified under the subtribe Cynodonteae, characterized by its specific growth habits and leaf morphology. The species Piptatherum microcarpum is further classified as a type of annual grass, which indicates its life cycle and growth patterns. Its classification as a member of the plant kingdom reflects its unique characteristics and relationships with other plant species.
